extracted_from: The sub-fund aims to achieve growth in capital, ahead of inflation (UK Retail Prices Index), over the longer term (5 to 7 years). The Sub-Fund fell -2.7%, peak-to-trough. During the reporting period, we reduced the Sub-Fund’s weighted average duration to these bonds from five years to two years. Schedule of investments As at 31 July 2025.
extraction_notes: Concentration and number of holdings derived from the 'Schedule of investments' as of 31 July 2025. Max drawdown is peak-to-trough for the Sub-Fund. Duration is for the bond component of the portfolio. Classification is inferred from the investment objective and diverse asset allocation (equities, bonds, gold).
